text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As I walk down the hallway, I come<n>across King
Halo and Fuji Kiseki<n>chatting together.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Everyone gets together to dance?<n>How splendid!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
If the idea tickles your fancy, would<n>you care to
join as well, my darling<n>pony?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Really?! Why, I'd love to!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, then let us enjoy ourselves<n>thoroughly on
the big day!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: You there! Do come as well, should<n>you desire.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You'll find that the invitation is<n>already... in your
hand!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I look at my hand and, sure enough,<n>the invitation
to the mysterious ball is<n>right there!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you've been invited to the ball as<n>well? Good
for you!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You'll have the opportunity to witness<n>this social
butterfly's dancing with<n>your very own eyes!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Such delights don't come your way<n>very often,
am I right?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Goodness, I'm sure there'll be<n>rumors running
wild. "Who's that<n>elegant lady over there? Why,
it can<n>only be..."

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Why the upward inflection? Say it<n>with conviction!
"King!"

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I shall make sure all eyes are<n>focused on me
when I dance with<n>Fuji at the ball!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
But... if I'm going to perform<n>alongside Fuji, I
have to make sure<n>I'm extremely well prepared.
choice_data_list: That sounds like a lot of work.
That sounds like a lot of work.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Don't act like it doesn't concern you!<n>Now that
you've been invited, you<n>must strive to be the
best you can be<n>as well!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Start by changing your mindset. Now,try giving me some advice as to howI should begin.
choice_data_list:
Practice a dance that will capture everyone's
attention.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hmm, interesting.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Indeed, the belle of the ball must<n>capture the
gaze of everyone in<n>attendance.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It is by wearing one's outfit with<n>pride and
dancing with the grace of a<n>butterfly that one
becomes first-rate. I<n>see you've done some
studying.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I must start my intense training at<n>once! Behold!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: SPLOSH!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Th-that's f-f-freezing!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: King Halo's resolve is the real deal.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She pours water over herself to add<n>extra strain
on her body as she<n>dances.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She also frequents an amusement<n>park to learn
from the dancers in the<n>parades.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: To maintain a smile and excellentposture even while wearing a heavyoutfit... This is what I strive toachieve. But no, I must go further!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: This continues over the course of a<n>few days...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
What do you make of my magnificent<n>moves?
I'm not known as "first-rate"<n>for no reason, you
know!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The sleeves of her signature<n>racewear flutter like
the wings of a<n>dancing butterfly... She has
mastered<n>the dance style she's been longing<n>
for.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
The ultimate outfit... Yes, those who<n>are first-rate
must stand at the summit<n>of fashion.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...I must set off on a journey.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Project King

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Mornings start early for King Halo.<n>She goes
through numerous books<n>trying to find inspiration
for the perfect<n>dress.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Classical, yet eye-catching... Then it<n>has to be...
Yes, of course... This one!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
When one is first-rate, there can be<n>no
compromise. She climbs a<n>precarious mountain
path to procure<n>the ultimate fabric from a
legendary<n>weaver.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Who in the world... would think... to<n>live... in a
place like this?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Cough, splutter! There's somuch dust...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
In search of a famous dressmaker,<n>she charters
a boat to cross the seas.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Wait, seriously now?! Does someone<n>actually
live here?!

text_block_list.name: Sailor
text_block_list.text: Haha! No, I'm just messin' with you!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You've got to be kidding! No joking<n>around!
Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After overcoming many hardships,<n>King Halo
finds her way home. The<n>purpose of her entire
journey was to<n>obtain this single outfit.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Well? How does it look? I got my<n>signature
racewear retailored to<n>perfection!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ohoho! OHOHOHO!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
King Halo's meticulous attention to<n>detail renders
me powerless to ask<n>what's changed about the
outfit. At<n>any rate, her hard work has paid off.
